chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 76 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 None present for the applicant Mr. Imran Iqbal, advocate for the respondent This reference application is pending since 2015 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
